name: The Cult of the Matriarch
description:
[Content warnings: femdom, foot fetish, body worship, facesitting, potential violence and scat]

Inspired by Far Cry 5. You've been born into a cult. For your entire childhood you were fed religious propaganda. Now that you're 18, you will have a personal meeting with the Matriarch like every member does at this age.

Will you submit to the Matriarch's will and become one of her devout worshippers? Attempt a daring escape from the cult's clutches, risking everything for freedom? Or resist from within, seeking to gather proof of their crimes and dismantle the cult?

I recommend reading the cult's beliefs to understand the terms that will be used:


The cult believes in an apocalyptic event known as "The Second Cleansing," during which most of humanity will die in a nuclear war to cleanse the world of sin. The Matriarch is believed to be chosen by God to preserve humanity, similar to how Noah was chosen during "The First Cleansing" (the Great Flood). To achieve this, the cult is building a huge network of bunkers called "The New Ark" and stockpiling resources to survive through the Second Cleansing. People outside the cult are called "sinful lambs" who will be sacrificed by God to purify humanity. The cult celebrates loyalty and blind faith, referred to as "trust", and views doubt and the demand for proof as grave sins. Cult members believe they are unworthy of worshipping God directly, so they worship the Matriarch, who then conveys their worship to God.
creator: Sly Slave
